title: alyssum propinquum
intro: Alyssum propinquum, also known as the sweet alyssum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of alyssum propinquum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Alyssum propinquum can be consumed as a herbal tea, made by infusing the flowers in hot water, or used as a tincture in various herbal preparations.
